title: Penpen is NOT adorable
wikitext:
[]: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by Lavinius » Fri Oct 30, 2020 11:26 am Of this forum's great defilement, and that line Inserted into the description, whose blatant lie Shame brought unto us, and all our woe, Sing, Heavenly Muse, and explain Why that fucking penguin isn't cute at all. Hideous to the sight, with crooked beak, Vile yellow, vile red, dressed like a freak, Short unlike haught Cæsars, in filthy hue, Not grey like a child fluff, nor pure like a Lord! His heart uncaring, scaring the boy, Reading the news, completely not to be adored! The abomination of Yukihara base ymade, Man blaspheming God, and recieving His just Bats'! Behold the bird of Ikuni wrought Shewn in his drum thereof, The fair tragedy of fair Apple-chan- Not the creepy little robot ones But the fowls natural Who in the aquarium dwelt Tall & fair, black, white in good color Swum as El Elyon wills. With what contrast rings the awful fowl The drunkard's pet, of Anno foul! In what hour, what minute, find ye him cute? When he falleth from the mortal fish? Verily I say, in that scene, consider him even more vile Than he is, in comparison to all others Gathered in that pleasant hall! There sat gentle Ritchan Gold of hair, dear of heart, Long of leg, a maid apart! And cold as his heart may be, No man Christian however or heathen Turk, Would withhold from Misato's embrace! And for the Boy of Faith himself, Sweet of hair, sweet of face, What soul would not him hug with love When for Shamshiel's wounds he weeps? What man wisheth not to wipe the tears, Be he wer or wife, young or old, From dear Shinji's adorable face? Praise instead God's biceptual owl Rather than the polar filth- of Sachiel I speak- The other lovely Third, with his pleasant blinks, Pergerine gills, and doubly cute beaks! Truly a great horror upon our dignity hath been wrought With Penpen's vile claim. So my comrades, friends, brothers, Evageeks, Let us not rest from the bird's elimination, 'Til we have built Penpenlessalem In Kantou's wet & cratered land.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Fri Oct 30, 2020 12:10 pm I dost agree with thine sentiment, my Lord. However, I forsooth thee to remember why the sentence “Asuka is hot” hath been removed in the first place. The controversy surrounding the sexual depiction of these teen-age characters hath been tumultuous throughout the fandom, and many here desireth not any accusations of paedophilia. Therefore, I urge mine most humble administrators to consider the phrase “Misato is hot” in stead. This fact hath been well recognized throughout the fandom, and the character’s age of 28 alloweth her sexualization to be not at all controversial.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by Lavinius » Fri Oct 30, 2020 12:17 pm ^ Personally I prefer "Sachiel is adorable", both truehearted & chaste.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 30, 2020 12:27 pm Lavinius wrote: Behold the bird of Ikuni wrought

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by Lavinius » Fri Oct 30, 2020 12:39 pm UrsusArctos wrote: No, 'tis the bird of Sadamoto wrought Thou hast in thy wrath falsely accused he The kind-hearted and gentle Ikuni Of deeds most foul and abominable Nevertheless, I, the most savage bear And diabolical one present here Have heard thy appeal from thy chastest heart And hence raise my hand and take up my seal To make this description correct and fair "Sachiel is adorable" be it!

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 30, 2020 1:00 pm Pardon my rash words, good sir, I have erred And all too soon have passe'd rash judgement Mayhap I have done you wrong in my haste Yea, I see that thou bearst no ill feelings To he, most admirable Ikuni Friend and companion of master Anno Gentle knight, thy verse doth not go in vain Before the dark council that here reigneth For our eyes and ears are ever open And our hearts are not close'd to lament Yea verily! That Angel of Thursday And water, long-limb'd, bird-fac'd, and blinking, Good Sachiel deserves that lordly praise That he hath in life and death justly won BusterMachine4 wrote: Therefore, I urge mine most humble administrators to consider the phrase “Misato is hot” in stead. This fact hath been well recognized throughout the fandom, and the character’s age of 28 alloweth her sexualization to be not at all controversial.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Fri Oct 30, 2020 1:57 pm Ah, ‘tis true. Then let us embrace the true beauty of God’s third holy messenger. Exeunt.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Oct 30, 2020 5:15 pm Bro what are y'all talking about?

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Fri Oct 30, 2020 6:50 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Bro what are y'all talking about?

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Oct 30, 2020 6:53 pm Pen-Pen is not real IMHO. Penguins are fictional animals.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Oct 30, 2020 7:05 pm Penguins are very real and very cute. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Oct 30, 2020 7:39 pm I see evil lurks in these forums once again. It must be banished forever, with great prejudice.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Oct 30, 2020 8:11 pm Verily, Sachiel and the Angels have their charms, But to hold the Pen of Two in regards with such Angels would be as grouping the stallion with the mares.

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 30, 2020 10:20 pm Honto ni pen-pen da Busukawaii shikashi Sachi ga kawaii (A rather poor attempt at a 7-9-7 haiku as opposed to the regular 5-7-5) Forsooth, the Pen of Two in regards with Such Angels high and mighty is rather To place a jester midst glorious knights Zounds! Do we not here speak of warriors great Maidens fair, villains grim and beasts fearsome?

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Oct 31, 2020 3:57 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: the Pen of Two

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Oct 31, 2020 5:51 am <Enters room> . <Glances left> . <Glances right> . Yes, he is. . <Runs>

[]: Re: Penpen is NOT adorable!             Quote Post by Berserker » Sat Oct 31, 2020 11:05 am I understand Shakespearean, but can't write of my own. And i don't have poetic creativity . So i'm gonna write straight forward in plain english. You mere mortals shall perish, as you called upon your own annihilation; as you spoke ill of thy god (FAR) trapped in a penguin body, shall he, pen of two create havoc with them claws. With the power of a penguin and thou ancestors, he will unleash hell on those, whom speaks of so called "angel"; Nothing but blasphemy,nam'd sachiel. Yeah, that was total cringe-worthy. Result of hating on poetry and not paying attention to those literature class in childhood.
